Derived Promise Feature

This feature demo compares derived promise update strategies: join, incremental, and immediate.

join (default)

State: fulfilled
Current value: Result for "test" at 3:04:05 AM
Previous value: Result for "select" at 3:04:05 AM

incremental

State: fulfilled
Current value: Result for "test" at 3:04:05 AM
Previous value: Result for "select" at 3:04:05 AM

immediate

State: fulfilled
Current value: Result for "test" at 3:04:05 AM
Previous value: Result for "select" at 3:04:05 AM
